result.stderr:
Geohash.GeoRaptor.CLI 0.2.0+ae499a051a50cd51c6f736521bdc27dc01a8dc48
Copyright © 2026 Andreas Ravnestad

  -f, --input-file           Path to a text file with geohashes (one geohash per
                             line)

  -l, --lowest-precision     Required. Lowest precision

  -h, --highest-precision    Required. Highest precision

  -g, --output-geometry      (Default: false) Enable this to add WKB geometries
                             to the output. Default value: false

  -H, --headers              (Default: false) If output-geometry is enabled,
                             then enable this to add CSV headers to the output.
                             Default value: false

  -s, --separator            (Default: ;) If output-geometry is enabled, this
                             option can be used to customize the column
                             separator

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

options.description: If output-geometry is enabled, then enable this to add CSV headers to the output. Default value: false
Path to a text file with geohashes (one geohash per line)
